english: What are the main types of diabetes commonly found in the Indian population
hindi: भारत में डायबिटीज के मुख्य प्रकार कौन से हैं
tamil: இந்தியாவில் பொதுவாகக் காணப்படும் நீரிழிவு வகைகள் என்னென்ன
vietnamese: Loại bệnh tiểu đường phổ biến ở dân số Ấn Độ là gì
correct_answer: The main types of diabetes are type 1, type 2, gestational diabetes, and LADA, with type 2 being the most prevalent in India
